# Stimulsoft BI

> API reference for Stimulsoft Cloud (cloud.stimulsoft.com). Documents REST and .NET API for authentication, user management, item storage, report templates, snapshots, schedulers, and multi-format export.

## Stimulsoft Cloud

- [.NET API](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/index.md)
- [Users](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/index.md)
- [Signing Up](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Signing_Up.md)
- [Logging In](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Logging_In.md)
- [Getting User Info](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Getting_User_Info.md)
- [Getting List of Users](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Getting_List_of_Users.md)
- [Changing User Info](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Changing_User_Info.md)
- [Changing User Password](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Changing_User_Password.md)
- [Creating New User](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Creating_New_User.md)
- [Deleting User](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Deleting_User.md)
- [Logging Out](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Users/Logging_Out.md)
- [Items](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/index.md)
- [Creating and Saving Items](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Creating_and_Saving_Items.md)
- [Sharing Items](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Sharing_Items.md)
- [Getting Item](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Getting_Item.md)
- [Getting List of Items](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Getting_List_of_Items.md)
- [Deleting Item](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Deleting_Item.md)
- [Resource Item](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Resource_Item.md)
- [Running Report](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/API/Items/Running_Report.md)
- [REST API](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/index.md)
- [Object Model](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Object_Model.md)
- [Sign Up](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/SignUp.md)
- [Login](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Login.md)
- [Logout](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Logout.md)
- [Users](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/index.md)
- [GET List](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/Get_List.md)
- [GET Info](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/Get_Info.md)

- [PUT Edit](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/Put_Edit.md)
- [DELETE](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/Delete.md)
- [Change password](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Users/Change_password.md)

- [DELETE](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Items/DELETE.md)

- [DELETE Reset](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Items/Share/DELETE_Reset.md)

- [Power Point](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Power_Point.md)
- [HTML](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/HTML.md)
- [Text](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Text.md)
- [Rich Text](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/RichText.md)

- [Open Document Writer](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/OpenDocumentWriter.md)
- [Excel](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Excel.md)
- [Open Document Calc](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/OpenDocumentCalc.md)
- [Data](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Data.md)
- [Image](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Image.md)
- [Download](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Download.md)
- [Track Task Status](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Cloud.API.Manual/Stimulsoft_Cloud/REST_API/Export/Track_Task_Status.md)
